rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash for description and amounts. The initial word 'Pauperiana' is a strong interpretation, and 'Brought over' is clear. Pence column shows a flourish, which gemini-flash correctly identifies and reasonably interprets as 0, unlike gpt-5-mini's '1' or claude-haiku's omission of amounts.

Visual verification confirms description 'Gas Lights to Dec. 1850' and amounts 27/5/10. claude-haiku misread pounds as '2'. gpt-5-mini misread 'Dec.' as 'Feby' and added '29:'. gemini-flash was closest on description, and correct on amounts.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's accurate reading of the description 'D. Mich.' and its corresponding amounts 8/11/0. gemini-flash incorrectly associated the description from the next row with these amounts. claude-haiku correctly identified 'Ditto' but missed the 'Mich.' and incorrectly left the pounds blank.

rows.description: By Falconer 12½ Int. on £247.14.2, 3½ Cents to July 1850
rows.notes: Description adopted from gemini-flash (its row 3 description), which accurately transcribed the complex text 'By Falconer 12½ Int. on £247.14.2, 3½ Cents to July 1850'. gemini-flash had misaligned this description with the previous row's amounts. The amounts 6/8/6 are clearly visible on the image and were correctly extracted by gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku.

Adopted gemini-flash's accurate transcription of description 'Subscriptions &c. Infirmary' and amounts 1/1/0. claude-haiku incorrectly classified this as a header and missed the amounts. gpt-5-mini was close on description but '&c.' is more accurate than 'Viz.'.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Grey Coat School'. Amounts 20/0/0 are clearly legible and agreed upon by all extractors.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'St. Giles Do'. Amounts 5/5/0 are clearly legible and agreed upon by all extractors.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'South Newington Do'. Amounts 5/5/0 are clearly legible and agreed upon by all extractors.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Little Tew Do'. Amounts 6/0/0 are clearly legible and agreed upon by all extractors.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Garston Do' and amounts 3/3/0, which are visually confirmed. claude-haiku misread the description and pounds amount.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Merton Do' and amounts 5/5/0. claude-haiku misread shillings as '3'. gpt-5-mini was close on description but 'Merton' is more precise than 'Morton'.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Garsington Do' and amounts 3/3/0. All extractors agreed on amounts, but description varied. gemini-flash was the most accurate.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'L. Wittenham Do' and amounts 5/5/0, visually confirmed. claude-haiku had a minor transcription difference ('Wittlehams').
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Bensington Do' and amounts 2/2/0, visually confirmed. claude-haiku had a minor transcription difference ('Berryngton').
Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Gwinicar Do' as the most accurate interpretation of the cursive script. All extractors agreed on amounts 5/0/0.

Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Poor of Gwinicar' as the most accurate transcription. The initial word is clearly 'Poor', not 'Door' (claude-haiku). 'Gwinicar' matches the prior row. Amounts 10/0/0 were agreed upon.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Diocesan Board of Education' and amounts 10/0/0, visually confirmed. claude-haiku had significant misreadings in the description.

rows.description: Small Livings in Diocese of Oxon
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Small Livings in Diocese of Oxon' as the most accurate. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku had significant misreadings due to script ambiguity. Amounts 5/0/0 were agreed upon.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Widows & Orphans of Clergy Do' and amounts 5/0/0, visually confirmed. claude-haiku had significant misreadings in the description.

Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'University. Marshalls' and amounts 2/0/0. claude-haiku incorrectly classified this as a header and omitted amounts. gpt-5-mini had a minor spelling difference ('Marshalle').

Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Bele Ringer & Chapel Clerk' and amounts 10/0/0. Both noted the 'Bele' spelling, confirming careful visual analysis. claude-haiku misread 'Bele' as 'Bale'.

Adopted gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Corn Rents' and crucially, the pounds column is empty (marked with a dash), not '1' as extracted by gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Shillings 19 and pence 6 are clear.

Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Easter Offering'. Amounts 1/1/0 were agreed upon by all extractors, but description varied. gpt-5-mini pluralized 'Offerings' and claude-haiku had 'Returns'.

Adopted gemini-flash's description, which accurately includes the detailed bracketed text as part of the entry. All extractors agreed on the amounts 21/13/4. claude-haiku incorrectly interpreted some text as struck-through.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description 'Synodals and Procurations' and amounts 2/16/8, visually confirmed. claude-haiku had significant misreadings in the description.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's accurate description 'College Gardener - 1st Quarter' and amounts 7/12/0. gemini-flash incorrectly classified this as a header and missed the amounts. claude-haiku misread the description and pounds as '4'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description '2nd Do' and amounts 7/13/9, visually confirmed. claude-haiku misread pounds as '1' and pence as '0'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description '3rd Do' and amounts 12/15/11, visually confirmed. claude-haiku misread pounds as '1', shillings as '13', and pence as '0'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini on description '4th Do' and amounts 7/12/0, visually confirmed. claude-haiku misread pounds as '1' and shillings as '13'.

Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Interest on Stubbs Deposit'. Its note explicitly addresses the ambiguity of the initial 'S' in 'Stubbs', which visually is correct. All extractors agreed on amounts 6/0/0.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Open Scholarships. Viz. Mr. Kempe.'. All extractors agreed on amounts 40/0/0. Other extractors had minor transcription errors in the name.
Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Mr. Hilgrefs'. Its note about the faded final 's' is accurate. All extractors agreed on amounts 40/0/0. Other extractors had different interpretations of the name.
Adopted gemini-flash's accurate description 'Mr. Coase'. All extractors agreed on amounts 40/0/0. Other extractors had different interpretations of the name.
Consensus across all extractors on row type 'total' and amounts 619/3/7, visually confirmed. gemini-flash's empty description for a total row where amounts are explicit is preferred.
